description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in e-moBLOG 1.3 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) monthy parameter to index.php or (2) login parameter to admin/index.php. NOTE: some sources have reported item 1 as involving the "monthly" parameter, but this is incorrect.
